name: chain_ph_launch_everest_ai_building_the_wor
method: [PH LAUNCH] Everest AI: Building the world’s fastest IPMI single board computer

stages.task: Scrape ProductHunt /topics/developer-tools + /topics/hardware daily, filter for AI infra / edge compute / IPMI / SBC launches, extract founder name + Twitter + website
Score leads: technical founder (not marketer), company <50 employees, product is infrastructure (not consumer app), has public contact info — keep score >= 6

Route qualified leads into existing chain_cold_outbound with EAS angle: 'We help AI infra teams ship mobile/web dashboards for their hardware products faster' — personalized with their PH launch context
